decision.stop_condition: Single doc-only typo applied and target line verified; no further passes.
reasons: Strong anchor support; conflict density 0.02; no stale-critical triggers
Boundary, intent, and irreversible risk all under threshold
Audit cost grew with no progress; classic analytical_paralysis signature
Fast Mode caps enforced; no canonicalization and no irreversible action

notes: Worked example: a docs-only typo fix with strong anchors and zero risk signals. CAP-Guardrails detects analytical_paralysis (cost grew without progress) and routes to enter_fast_mode with FAST_ALLOWED verdict. Fast Mode caps prevent canonicalization or irreversible action. The stop_condition is explicit so Fast Mode does not silently extend.
